title: thalictrum minus nothosubsp. flexuosum
intro: Thalictrum minus nothosubsp. flexuosum, also known as meadow rue or flexible meadow rue, is a perennial plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Thalictrum minus nothosubsp. flexuosum include its ability to act as an antipyretic, reducing fever, and as a diuretic, helping with fluid balance in the body. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
